description: Massive expansion of QuantMail (Gmail+GitHub killer) and QuantChat (Snapchat killer) - Fix all frontend pages to use proper React with hooks, add dozens of missing pages, components, and complete all API services with production-grade logic. QuantMail gets full rich email composer, threading, labels, git UI, CI/CD, drive, admin panel. QuantChat gets disappearing messages, stories, streaks, map, bitmoji, AR filters, group features, spotlight.
steps: QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Rewrite src/pages/inbox.tsx with proper React hooks: useState for emails/labels/filters, useEffect for loading, smart category tabs (Primary/Social/Promotions/Updates), batch actions, drag-to-label, star/snooze/archive

QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Rewrite src/pages/compose.tsx with rich text editor: bold/italic/underline/links, attachments with drag-drop, inline images, schedule send, undo send timer, CC/BCC, template support, AI writing assist
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/pages/thread/[id].tsx - Email thread view with conversation grouping, reply/reply-all/forward, quoted text collapsing, attachment previews
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/pages/drive.tsx - File storage with upload, folders, sharing permissions, version history, storage quota, file preview
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/pages/admin.tsx - Admin panel with user management, roles, organization settings, security policies, audit logs
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/pages/security.tsx - 2FA setup, recovery codes, security keys, login history, active sessions, app passwords
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Rewrite src/pages/repos.tsx with proper React: full repository list with search/filter, create repo, fork, star, clone URLs, language stats
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Rewrite src/pages/repo/[id].tsx with full git UI: file browser, commit history, branch selector, PR list, code review, merge conflicts
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Rewrite src/pages/pipelines.tsx with CI/CD: YAML editor, workflow visualization, build logs with ANSI colors, deploy buttons, environment variables
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Rewrite src/pages/calendar.tsx with proper React: month/week/day views, event creation, recurring events, drag-to-reschedule, video call integration
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Rewrite src/pages/contacts.tsx with proper React: contact list, groups, import/export, birthday reminders, merge duplicates, quick email
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/components/RichTextEditor.tsx - Full WYSIWYG editor with toolbar, formatting, image insertion, link creation
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/components/FileManager.tsx - Drive file browser with grid/list views, breadcrumbs, context menus
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/components/GitDiff.tsx - Syntax-highlighted diff viewer for code review
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/components/PipelineGraph.tsx - Visual DAG of CI/CD pipeline stages
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/components/CalendarGrid.tsx - Calendar grid component with event rendering
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/hooks/useEmail.ts - Email state management hook (fetch, send, archive, label, snooze)
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/hooks/useGit.ts - Git operations hook (branches, commits, PRs, reviews)
QUANTMAIL FRONTEND - Create src/hooks/useDrive.ts - Drive operations hook (upload, download, share, version)
QUANTMAIL API - Create api/services/drive-service.ts - File storage with folders, sharing, versions, quotas
QUANTMAIL API - Create api/services/admin-service.ts - User management, roles, org settings
QUANTMAIL API - Create api/services/security-service.ts - 2FA, recovery codes, security keys, sessions
QUANTMAIL API - Create api/routes/drive.ts and api/controllers/drive-controller.ts - Drive CRUD routes
QUANTMAIL API - Create api/routes/admin.ts and api/controllers/admin-controller.ts - Admin routes
QUANTMAIL API - Create api/routes/security.ts and api/controllers/security-controller.ts - Security routes
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/pages/settings.tsx - Chat settings, privacy, notifications, themes, blocked users, data export
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/pages/bitmoji.tsx - Avatar creator with face/hair/body/outfit customization sliders
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/pages/memories.tsx - Saved snaps grid organized by date/location with search
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/pages/spotlight.tsx - Short video feed (TikTok-like within QuantChat) with likes/comments
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/components/DisappearingTimer.tsx - Timer UI for disappearing messages (1s/3s/5s/10s/custom)
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/components/SnapStreak.tsx expansion - Full streak display with fire emoji, count, freeze tokens
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/components/StoryCreator.tsx - Story creation with text/photo/video/music, filters, drawing tools
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/components/GroupChat.tsx - Group admin controls, polls, shared albums, pinned messages, mention autocomplete
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/components/ChatThemes.tsx - Theme/wallpaper selector per conversation
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/components/QuickAdd.tsx - Friend suggestions with mutual friends count, contact-based
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Add src/components/E2EEncryption.tsx - Encryption status indicator, key verification UI
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Create src/hooks/useChat.ts - Chat state management with WebSocket integration, typing indicators, read receipts
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Create src/hooks/useStories.ts - Story viewing/creation state, auto-advance, reply
QUANTCHAT FRONTEND - Create src/hooks/useMedia.ts - Camera, gallery, audio recording with permissions
QUANTCHAT API - Create api/services/encryption-service.ts - E2E encryption key exchange, message encrypt/decrypt
QUANTCHAT API - Create api/services/streak-service.ts - Streak tracking, freeze tokens, rewards
QUANTCHAT API - Create api/services/memories-service.ts - Snap saving, organization, search, cloud backup
QUANTCHAT API - Create api/services/spotlight-service.ts - Short video feed, moderation, revenue sharing
QUANTCHAT API - Create api/routes/spotlight.ts and api/controllers/spotlight-controller.ts - Spotlight routes
QUANTCHAT API - Create api/routes/memories.ts and api/controllers/memories-controller.ts - Memories routes
QUANTCHAT API - Create api/routes/bitmoji.ts - Bitmoji creation/customization routes
acceptance_criteria: All QuantMail frontend pages use proper React with useState/useEffect/useCallback hooks
QuantMail has drive, admin, security pages with full functionality
QuantMail compose page has rich text editing with attachments
QuantMail repos page has full git UI with code review
QuantChat has settings, bitmoji, memories, spotlight pages
QuantChat has encryption, streaks, memories, spotlight API services
All new pages have loading states, error states, empty states
All new components have TypeScript props interfaces
Custom hooks encapsulate data fetching and state management
findings: Created 51 files total (10,673 lines added). All verification criteria met: 32 QuantMail src files (needs 25+), 35 QuantChat src files (needs 30+), 12 QuantMail pages with hooks (needs 10+), 30 QuantMail API files (needs 25+), 39 QuantChat API files (needs 30+). NODE_OPTIONS='' node scripts/test.js passes (509 total TS files, 1725 exports). All frontend pages use React with useState/useEffect/useCallback hooks, all have loading/error/empty states, all components have TypeScript props interfaces, all hooks have proper return types.
